---
title: "PLS-SEM Results - HSR Well-Being Model"
author: "Alireza Moradpour"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-26"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```

```{r}
## R Markdown
library(seminr)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(DiagrammeR)

# Run your full clean R script first
source("../scripts/hsr_plssem_analysis.R")
```


```{r}
cronbach_alpha <- function(dataframe, items) {
  item_data <- dataframe[, items]
  item_data <- item_data[complete.cases(item_data), ]
  k <- ncol(item_data)
  item_vars <- apply(item_data, 2, var)
  total_var <- var(rowSums(item_data))
  alpha <- (k / (k - 1)) * (1 - sum(item_vars) / total_var)
  return(alpha)
}

alpha_values <- sapply(construct_items, function(items) {
  cronbach_alpha(hsr_data, items)
})

rhoa_values <- tryCatch(
  rho_A(hsr_pls, constructs = names(construct_items)),
  error = function(e) rep(NA, length(construct_items))
)

rhoC_AVE_table <- rhoC_AVE(hsr_pls)

reliability_full <- data.frame(
  Construct = names(construct_items),
  Cronbach_Alpha = round(as.numeric(alpha_values), 3),
  rhoA = round(as.numeric(rhoa_values), 3),
  rhoC = round(rhoC_AVE_table[, "rhoC"], 3),
  AVE = round(rhoC_AVE_table[, "AVE"], 3)
)

kable(reliability_full,
      caption = "Construct Reliability and Convergent Validity") %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)
```


```{r}

outer_loadings_table <- as.data.frame(hsr_pls$outer_loadings)

kable(outer_loadings_table,
      digits = 3,
      caption = "Outer Loadings") %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)
```


```{r}
kable(htmt_table,
      digits = 3,
      caption = "HTMT Ratio Matrix") %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)
```

```{r}
path_table <- as.data.frame(hsr_pls$path_coef)

kable(path_table,
      digits = 3,
      caption = "Structural Path Coefficients") %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)
```
  

```{r}
  f2_table <- data.frame(
  Relationship = c(
    "Service Quality -> Subjective Well-Being",
    "Travel Experience Affect -> Subjective Well-Being",
    "Cognitive Evaluation -> Subjective Well-Being",
    "Travel Experience Affect -> Customer Loyalty",
    "Cognitive Evaluation -> Customer Loyalty",
    "Subjective Well-Being -> Customer Loyalty",
    "Subjective Well-Being -> Willingness to Pay"
  ),
  f2 = c(
    fSquared(hsr_pls, iv = "Service_Quality", dv = "Subjective_Well_Being"),
    fSquared(hsr_pls, iv = "Travel_Experience_Affect", dv = "Subjective_Well_Being"),
    fSquared(hsr_pls, iv = "Cognitive_Evaluation", dv = "Subjective_Well_Being"),
    fSquared(hsr_pls, iv = "Travel_Experience_Affect", dv = "Customer_Loyalty"),
    fSquared(hsr_pls, iv = "Cognitive_Evaluation", dv = "Customer_Loyalty"),
    fSquared(hsr_pls, iv = "Subjective_Well_Being", dv = "Customer_Loyalty"),
    fSquared(hsr_pls, iv = "Subjective_Well_Being", dv = "Willingness_to_Pay")
  )
)
```

## R² Values

```{r}
r2_raw <- hsr_pls$rSquared

r2_table <- data.frame(
  Construct = rownames(r2_raw),
  R2 = round(as.numeric(r2_raw[, 1]), 3),
  row.names = NULL
)

kable(r2_table,
      caption = "Coefficient of Determination (R²)") %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)
```

## f² Values

```{r}
kable(f2_table,
      digits = 3,
      caption = "f² Effect Sizes") %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)
```
  
## VIF
```{r} 
  kable(vif_table,
      digits = 3,
      caption = "Collinearity Assessment Using VIF") %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)
```  


---

## Structural Path Coefficients - List Format
```{r}
path_matrix <- hsr_pls$path_coef
path_list <- as.data.frame(as.table(path_matrix))
colnames(path_list) <- c("From", "To", "Path_Coefficient")
path_list <- path_list[path_list$Path_Coefficient != 0 & !is.na(path_list$Path_Coefficient), ]
path_list$Path_Coefficient <- round(path_list$Path_Coefficient, 3)

kable(path_list,
      caption = "Structural Path Coefficients - List Format") %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)
```
  

## 3. Total effects, total indirect effects and specific indirect effects


```{r}
# Direct effects matrix
B <- hsr_pls$path_coef
B[is.na(B)] <- 0

# Total effects = B + B^2 + B^3 + ...
total_matrix <- B
power_matrix <- B

for (i in 2:nrow(B)) {
  power_matrix <- power_matrix %*% B
  total_matrix <- total_matrix + power_matrix
}

total_matrix <- round(total_matrix, 3)

# Total indirect effects = total effects - direct effects
total_indirect_matrix <- round(total_matrix - B, 3)

# Convert total effects to list
total_effects_list <- as.data.frame(as.table(total_matrix))
colnames(total_effects_list) <- c("From", "To", "Total_Effect")
total_effects_list <- total_effects_list[
  total_effects_list$Total_Effect != 0 & !is.na(total_effects_list$Total_Effect), ]

# Convert total indirect effects to list
total_indirect_list <- as.data.frame(as.table(total_indirect_matrix))
colnames(total_indirect_list) <- c("From", "To", "Total_Indirect_Effect")
total_indirect_list <- total_indirect_list[
  total_indirect_list$Total_Indirect_Effect != 0 & !is.na(total_indirect_list$Total_Indirect_Effect), ]

kable(total_effects_list,
      caption = "Total Effects - List Format") %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)

kable(total_indirect_list,
      caption = "Total Indirect Effects - List Format") %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)
```
  
 
---

## 4. Specific indirect effects

```{r}
find_paths <- function(B, start, end, visited = c()) {
  visited <- c(visited, start)
  next_nodes <- colnames(B)[B[start, ] != 0]
  next_nodes <- setdiff(next_nodes, visited)
  
  paths <- list()
  
  for (node in next_nodes) {
    if (node == end) {
      paths <- c(paths, list(c(start, end)))
    } else {
      sub_paths <- find_paths(B, node, end, visited)
      for (p in sub_paths) {
        paths <- c(paths, list(c(start, p)))
      }
    }
  }
  
  return(paths)
}

specific_effects <- data.frame(
  Path = character(),
  Specific_Indirect_Effect = numeric()
)

constructs <- rownames(B)

for (from in constructs) {
  for (to in constructs) {
    paths_found <- find_paths(B, from, to)
    
    for (p in paths_found) {
      if (length(p) > 2) {
        effect <- 1
        for (i in 1:(length(p) - 1)) {
          effect <- effect * B[p[i], p[i + 1]]
        }
        
        specific_effects <- rbind(
          specific_effects,
          data.frame(
            Path = paste(p, collapse = " -> "),
            Specific_Indirect_Effect = round(effect, 3)
          )
        )
      }
    }
  }
}

specific_effects <- specific_effects[specific_effects$Specific_Indirect_Effect != 0, ]

kable(specific_effects,
      caption = "Specific Indirect Effects") %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) 
``` 
  
  
  
```{r} 
  graph_hsr <- dot_graph(hsr_pls)
DiagrammeR::grViz(graph_hsr)
```

```{r} 
  summary(boot_hsr)
```
